title: GROUPING SETS on groups with aliases provided in the SELECT returns empty result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE courses (course_name VARCHAR(255), credits INT, department VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO courses (course_name, credits, department) VALUES ('Database Systems', 3, 'CS'), ('Algorithms', 4, 'CS'), ('Linear Algebra', 3, 'Math'), ('Statistics', 3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE enrollments (student_id INT, course_name VARCHAR(255), grade FLOAT);
INSERT INTO enrollments (student_id, course_name, grade) VALUES (1, 'Database Systems', 3.5), (2, 'Algorithms', NULL), (3, 'Linear Algebra', 4.0), (1, 'Statistics', NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, course_name, department FROM courses GROUP BY course_name, department WITH ROLLUP ORDER BY total_count, course_name, department;
key_bug_features: GROUPING SETS with aliases in SELECT returns empty result
